response:
```python
def shortest_palindrome(s):
    rev_s = s[::-1]
    lps = [0] * len(rev_s)
    for i in range(1, len(rev_s)):
        j = lps[i - 1]
        while j > 0 and rev_s[i] != rev_s[j]:
            j = lps[j - 1]
        if rev_s[i] == rev_s[j]:
            j += 1
        lps[i] = j
    longest_pal_prefix = lps[-1]
    return s[:len(s) - longest_pal_prefix] + rev_s[:longest_pal_prefix]

s = input().strip()
print(shortest_palindrome(s))
```
